'''dathuku''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hidalgoism|hidalgoism]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-th-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hidalgoism|hidalgoism]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dathuku
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæthikith|dæthikith]] || [[word:dæthikij|dæthikij]] || [[word:dæthikish|dæthikish]] || [[word:dæthiki|dæthiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dathuthukuth|dathuthukuth]] || [[word:dathuthukuj|dathuthukuj]] || [[word:dathuthukush|dathuthukush]] || [[word:dathuthuku|dathuthuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dathukuth|dathukuth]] || [[word:dathukuj|dathukuj]] || [[word:dathukush|dathukush]] || [[word:dathuku|dathuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dathufkufth|dathufkufth]] || [[word:dathufkufj|dathufkufj]] || [[word:dathufkufsh|dathufkufsh]] || [[word:dathufkuf|dathufkuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dathukuthu|dathukuthu]] || [[word:dathukuju|dathukuju]] || [[word:dathukushu|dathukushu]] || [[word:dathukuku|dathukuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dathukuth|dathukuth]] || [[word:dathukuj|dathukuj]] || [[word:dathukush|dathukush]] || [[word:dathuku|dathuku]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dathukuthul|dathukuthul]] || [[word:dathukujul|dathukujul]] || [[word:dathukushul|dathukushul]] || [[word:dathukukul|dathukukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dathukuuthuthu|dathukuuthuthu]] || [[word:dathukuujuju|dathukuujuju]] || [[word:dathukuushushu|dathukuushushu]] || [[word:dathukuuku|dathukuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dathukuthun|dathukuthun]] || [[word:dathukujun|dathukujun]] || [[word:dathukushun|dathukushun]] || [[word:dathukukun|dathukukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dathukuthuoro|dathukuthuoro]] || [[word:dathukujuoro|dathukujuoro]] || [[word:dathukushuoro|dathukushuoro]] || [[word:dathukukuoro|dathukukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|c579b50}}
